description: Per-clinic-site facility standards attestation. Annual audit. Building + equipment + sterile-zone certification + accessibility + emergency-preparedness. Land Registry cross-link (waqf-equivalent inalienable donation per ADR-2605192245 if applicable). Council ≥3 attestation. G11 reinforce: no commercial EHR at this facility.

facilityLocationLandRegistryCid.description: Optional: Land Registry CID if facility is on Land-Trust-owned property (waqf-equivalent inalienable per ADR-2605192245)

equipmentInventoryCid.description: Equipment inventory list CID (sterilization equipment, exam tables, etc.)

accessibilityComplianceAttested.description: WCAG / ADA / equivalent jurisdictional accessibility standards

commercialEhrNoneInstalled.description: G11 ATTESTATION: facility confirms NO commercial EHR (Epic / Cerner / Athena / Allscripts / NextGen / eClinicalWorks / Greenway / Practice Fusion) is installed

patientCapacity.description: Maximum concurrent patient capacity (informs R2/R3 scale planning)

councilAttestations.description: ≥3 Council Lv6+ DIDs attesting the facility audit

medicalAdvisoryMdDid.description: ≥1 licensed-MD on Council medical advisory who reviewed the audit
